payload.answer: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; he still listens to Bill Evans, lately more early Coltrane; he agreed to catch up and asked Daniele to send him the article.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.
payload.decision: commit_supported_current_facts_and_low-risk_preferences; do not infer AI infra interest beyond a proposed catch-up
